eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Morrison; Benton; Cass; Crow Wing; Mille Lacs; Stearns; Todd, MN; at 11:39 AM on OCT 2, 2019 Effective until 12:39 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a required weekly test from the Morrison County Sheriffs Office THIS IS ONLY A TEST
